We give local fighters a legitimate, safe, and electric platform to compete â and we put on events that sell out. We're a small, fast-moving team that punches well above our weight, and we're scaling up.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>The role</strong></p><p>We're hiring a Marketing Coordinator to be the engine room of our marketing operation. You'll work directly under our Director of Marketing, owning the day-to-day execution that keeps our brand loud and consistent across every channel. You'll also help direct and coordinate our social media and graphic design interns, making sure the right content ships on time, every time. This is a hands-on, fast-paced role for someone who loves to get things done and wants to grow with a brand that's on the rise.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>What you'll do</strong></p><ul><li>Schedule, publish, and manage content across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube</li><li>Keep our content calendar organized and on track across events, fight announcements, and promotions</li><li>Coordinate the day-to-day workflow of our social media and graphic design interns</li><li>Maintain and update the RFL website with event info, fighter pages, and ticket links</li><li>Manage email marketing campaigns and audience lists</li><li>Pull and report basic performance metrics (engagement, reach, ticket-driving content)</li><li>Help coordinate marketing logistics on fight night and at promotional events</li><li>Keep brand assets, files, and approvals organized and accessible</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>What we're looking for</strong></p><ul><li>1â2 years in a marketing, social media, or content coordination role</li><li>Strong organizational skills â you keep a lot of plates spinning without dropping Canva/Adobe, email tools (Mailchimp/Klaviyo), or basic web CMS editing</li><li>Bonus: a genuine interest in combat sports, live events, or local sports culture</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Why RFL</strong></p><ul><li>Real ownership and visible impact on a growing brand</li><li>Direct mentorship from our marketing leadership</li><li>A front-row seat to live event production</li><li>Room to
